failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of TBAB/EG DES at lower temperatures or solute precipitation during residence time
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement heat-traced tubing for all feed lines and pre-heating zone

failure_modes.cause: Local hotspots in PFA tubing due to low thermal conductivity at 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Use a high-stability oil bath with active PID temperature control

failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of DES leading to erratic delivery at Q=4.2 mL/min
failure_modes.mitigation: Install a pulse dampener downstream of the pump

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage by precipitated solids leads to immediate overpressure
validation_experiments: Long-term stability run (5x tau) with DES solvent at 120°C to monitor for pressure drift or precipitation
Viscosity-temperature profile mapping of the TBAB/EG mixture to ensure pump compatibility across the startup ramp
Conversion sensitivity test: vary tau from 2.0 to 12.0 min to validate if the low conversion (X=0.12) is kinetic or due to mixing inefficiencies
